issues.description: Action type is 'SearchDeck' but effect text specifies 'from your trash' — should be 'FlipLife' or similar trash-recovery action. Correct action should search/retrieve from trash, not deck.
Filter uses 'ByName' with name 'Usopp' but effect specifies 'blue [Usopp]' — filter should include color constraint (blue) and card type (Usopp character).
Missing 'amount' constraint — effect says 'up to 1' but action has no limit specified.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Add up to 1 blue [Usopp] from your trash to your hand.
